summary: Tested Evolution PRO new separate flows: CLIENTE ANALISI (/analisi-strategica) and PARTNER (/partner-login). All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend flows verified: registration, dashboard-cliente with 4-step progress bar, questionario with 7 questions, and partner login. Security separation working correctly - unauthenticated users redirected to appropriate login pages.

minor.issue: Token refresh failing (invalid_grant) - unrelated to cliente-analisi flow

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing dependency 'verifyPayment' - minor code quality issue

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/cliente-analisi/register - Creates new cliente_analisi user with token
✅ User type separation: cliente_analisi vs partner/admin
✅ UI: /analisi-strategica landing page loads with registration form
✅ UI: Dashboard shows 4-step progress bar (Registrazione, Questionario, Analisi Strategica, Call con Claudio)
✅ UI: Questionario page shows 7 questions with navigation
✅ UI: /partner-login page loads with login form
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DashboardPagamento.jsx has ESLint warning for useEffect dependency - add verifyPayment to dependency array or use useCallback
seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix test_* for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: New cliente-analisi flow fully tested. Routes: /analisi-strategica (registration), /dashboard-cliente (progress), /questionario (7 questions), /sblocca-analisi (€67 payment), /analisi-in-preparazione (post-payment). Partner flow: /partner-login -> /dashboard-partner. Security separation verified - cliente_analisi users cannot access partner dashboard and vice versa.

verified_features.cliente_analisi_registration: WORKING - POST /api/cliente-analisi/register creates user with user_type='cliente_analisi'
verified_features.auto_login_after_registration: WORKING - Token returned and user redirected to dashboard-cliente
verified_features.dashboard_cliente_progress_bar: WORKING - 4 steps displayed (Registrazione ✓, Questionario, Analisi Strategica, Call con Claudio)
verified_features.questionario_7_questions: WORKING - 7 questions with textarea, navigation, and submit
verified_features.sblocca_analisi_payment: WORKING - €67 price displayed, Stripe checkout creation works
